feed.title: Dubai Time
feed.subtitle: Your Real-Time Guide to Dubai News, Services & Updates

entry.title: How to Reach Rashidiya from Mussafah by Bus: Timings and Travel Tips

link.title: How to Reach Rashidiya from Mussafah by Bus: Timings and Travel Tips

entry.content:
If you’re planning a trip from Mussafah to Rashidiya, taking the bus is an efficient and budget-friendly option. This guide will walk you through the journey, providing you with all the necessary details to make your travel experience seamless and enjoyable. Whether you’re a local or a visitor, navigating Dubai’s public transport can be straightforward and rewarding with the right information.

1. Bus Route from Mussafah Shabiya to Rashidiya (Best Overall)

This route offers a great balance between cost and travel time, combining bus and metro services for a smooth journey.

  • Estimated Total Travel Time: 2 hours 40 minutes

  • Cost: AED 32-44

Journey Overview:

Step 1: Start at Mussafah Shabiya Bus Station 2 hours 13 minutes, AED 32-44, Bus: E102 (Regular service), Stop: Al Jafiliya Bus Station.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Step 2: Transfer at Al Jafiliya Bus Station 3 minutes, Walk to Max Metro Station. This brief transfer involves a short walk to connect with the metro service.

Step 3: Ride the Metro to Centerpoint Metro Station 24 minutes, Metro Line: MRed (Regular service). Upon arriving at Centerpoint Metro Station, you will be just a short distance from your final destination in Rashidiya.

Additional Travel Tips

  • Plan Ahead: Check the latest bus and metro schedules online to avoid any surprises on travel day.

  • Keep Essentials Handy: Make sure you have your Nol card ready for easy access to public transport.
  • Explore Along the Way: If time allows, consider stopping at some attractions near the bus or metro stations for a quick sightseeing adventure.

Some other interesting trips you can check out include Ajman to Umm Al Quwain and Fujairah to Umm Al Quwain.

With this information in hand, you’re well-equipped to navigate your journey from Mussafah to Rashidiya smoothly. Enjoy your travels and the vibrant sights of Dubai! Don’t forget to keep your bus and metro schedules handy, as this will help you plan your trip effectively. Safe travels, and may your adventure through this stunning city be filled with memorable experiences!
entry.summary: If you’re planning a trip from Mussafah to Rashidiya, taking the bus is an efficient and budget-friendly option. This guide will walk you through the journey, providing you with all the necessary details to make your travel experience seamless and enjoyable. Whether you’re a local or a visitor, navigating Dubai’s public transport can be straightforward and rewarding with the right information.

entry.title: Bus 170 Timings Saadiyat New York University 2 to Al Zeina

link.title: Bus 170 Timings Saadiyat New York University 2 to Al Zeina

entry.content:
Yes, many of tourists and expatriates who live in the city. In the bustling metropolis of Abu Dhabi, where modernity meets tradition, an efficient public transportation system is the lifeline that keeps the city moving.

Among the various modes of transport available, the bus network stands out as a vital artery, connecting residents and visitors to key destinations across the emirate. Understanding the routes of Abu Dhabi’s buses is not merely a matter of convenience; it’s a crucial aspect of navigating the city’s vibrant landscape. Contents

Abu Dhabi 170 Bus Timetable

170 Bus of Abu Dhabi operates everyday with the first departure at 05.22 at Al Zeina and the last departure is at 22.27, and here is the complete of 170 bus timetable.

From Saadiyat New York University 2 From Al Zeina
06:36 05:22
06:51 06:00
07:06 06:24
07:21 06:39
07:36 06:54
07:51 07:09
08:06 07:24
08:21 07:39
08:36 07:54
08:51 08:09
09:06 08:24
09:21 08:39
09:51 08:54
10:21 09:09
10:51 09:24
11:21 09:54
11:51 10:24
12:21 10:54
12:51 11:24
13:21 11:54
13:51 12:24
14:21 12:54
14:51 13:24
15:19 13:54
15:49 14:24
16:04 14:54
16:19 15:30
16:34 15:45
16:51 16:00
17:04 16:15
17:19 16:30
17:34 16:45
17:49 17:00
18:04 17:15
18:23 17:30
18:38 17:45
18:53 18:00
19:21 18:15
19:51 18:30
20:21 18:54
20:51 19:24
21:21 19:54
21:51 20:24
22:21 20:54
21:24  
21:54  
22:27  

Download PDF Bus 170

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link to access the 170 Bus Timings.## Al Zeina to Saadiyat New York University 2 Route

Based on the RTA website, Bus 170 connects Al Zeina and Saadiyat New York University 2 with several stops, we know that Al Zeina is a residential development located in the Al Raha Beach area of Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.

It is a waterfront community that offers a mix of apartments, townhouses, and villas, along with retail outlets, cafes, restaurants, and recreational facilities. And New York University Abu Dhabi (NYUAD) is located on Saadiyat Island in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.

It is one of NYU’s global campuses and offers undergraduate programs in various fields including arts and humanities, social sciences, sciences, engineering, and more. Two two places are very important, and many of people want to visit the places by taking the bus.

170 Bus Route and Stops

By taking 170 Bus, you will see several landmarks in Abu Dhabi. There are 14 stops when you choose the trip by taking 170 bus, several of them are Abu Dhabi Bus Station, Gold Center, Emirates Tower and etc. Here are the complete stops of 170 bus route.1. Al Zeina

  1. Al Raha Boulevard

  2. Al Rahah Street

  3. Al Jazeera Sports Club

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street

  2. Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  3. Mariam Bint Said Mosque

  4. Gold Center

  5. Ministry of Economy

  6. Emirates Tower

  7. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque

  8. Jacques Chirac Street

  9. Saadiyat Islan

  10. Saadiyat New York University 2

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can explore include the 121 bus route passing through stations from Hidd Al Saadiyat to Mazyad Mall (MBZ City) and the 155 bus route from Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to Shakhbout City, ADNOC.Read Also: Abu Dhabi Airport Bus A1 Timetable ## Journey Experience

A trip on Bus 170 from Saadiyat New York University 2 to Al Zeina offers a long but fascinating journey through Abu Dhabi’s vibrant urban and coastal areas.

As the route heads toward Al Zeina, a scenic residential and commercial hub located along the waterfront, passengers can enjoy glimpses of pristine beaches and lush landscapes.

And it connects two popular places Al Zeina and Saadiyat New York University. By understanding the route and referring to the 170 bus timetable, passengers can plan their journeys effectively, ensuring a seamless and enjoyable travel experience amidst the dynamic backdrop of Abu Dhabi’s cultural, commercial, and recreational attractions.
entry.summary: Yes, many of tourists and expatriates who live in the city. In the bustling metropolis of Abu Dhabi, where modernity meets tradition, an efficient public transportation system is the lifeline that keeps the city moving.

entry.title: 113 Bus Schedule Sharjah to Rashidiya Route

link.title: 113 Bus Schedule Sharjah to Rashidiya Route

entry.content:
Let’s chat about the 113 bus the MVP of Dubai-Sharjah routes. This bad boy is always packed, and for good reason. It’s the lifeline connecting Al Rolla Terminal in Sharjah to Rashidiya Metro Station in Dubai, hitting all the key spots along the way.

Seriously, this intercity beast is the glue holding the public transport system together between these two cities. Comfy ride, essential stops it’s a commuter’s dream. No wonder it’s the go-to for so many people making the daily Dubai-Sharjah hustle!

Contents

113 Bus Timings

The 113 bus operates daily from Sunday to Saturday. The first bus depart from Al Rolla Terminal at 05.45 am and the last bus departs at 11.20 pm. The buses run at intervals of approximately 30 minutes, ensuring regular and timely service throughout the day. And here is the complete of 113 bus timings that depart from Al Rolla Terminal:

From Sharjah From Rashidiya
05:45 06:50
06:15 07:20
06:45 07:50
07:15 08:20
07:45 08:50
08:15 09:20
08:45 09:50
09:15 10:20
09:45 10:50
10:15 11:20
10:45 11:50
11:15 12:20
11:45 12:50
12:15 13:20
12:45 13:50
13:15 14:20
13:38 14:50
14:01 15:13
14:24 15:36
14:47 15:59
15:10 16:22
15:33 16:45
15:56 17:08
16:19 17:31
16:42 17:54
17:05 18:17
17:28 18:40
17:51 19:03
18:14 19:26
18:37 19:49
19:00 20:12
19:23 20:35
19:46 20:58
20:09 21:21
20:32 21:44
21:00 22:07
21:35 22:35
22:10 23:05
22:45 23:40
23:20

113 Bus Route

Many of people in Sharjah visit to Rashidiya because this place is very strategic place.

It situated near Dubai International Airport and is easily accessible from the E311 Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, making it a convenient starting point for travelers.

The stationâ€™s strategic location near major roadways and residential areas facilitates easy commuting for a large number of passengers daily.

And the route of 113 bus has several stops, here are some of them.

1.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Jubail Terminal: Located near the Al Jubail Fish Market, this stop serves as a major transit hub in Sharjah.

  2. King Faisal Street: A busy street near Al Qasba and Al Majaz Waterfront, offering scenic views and recreational activities.

  3. Malihan Road: Close to Sharjah Desert Park, a great spot for nature lovers.

  4. Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Square: Near Dubai Silicon Oasis, a tech hub with many offices and residential areas.

  5. Al Qusais Bus Station: Close to Al Nahda Pond Park, a popular leisure spot.

7.

  1. Rashidiya Metro Station: The final stop, conveniently connected to the Dubai Metro’s Red Line, facilitating easy travel within Dubai.

Read Also: 117 Bus Timings Sharjah to Abu Dhabi

Fare

The fare for a journey from Al Rolla Terminal to Rashidiya Metro Station is 15 AED. If you’re traveling from Rashidiya to Sharjah, the fare is 10 AED. The journey is around 30 km that take around 1 hour trip.

Journey Experience

The 113 bus from Sharjah to Rashidiya offers a long yet enjoyable ride that showcases the UAE’s rich culture and urban development. Departing from Sharjah, passengers can admire the bustling Al Qasba canal, known for its art and entertainment options, as well as historic sites like the Sharjah Museum of Islamic Civilization, reflecting the city’s dedication to preserving its heritage.

As the bus crosses into Dubai, travelers catch glimpses of vibrant neighborhoods like Al Nahda and Al Mamzar, which feature a mix of local markets and modern shopping centers. The journey concludes in Rashidiya, near Dubai International Airport, making it a key area for travelers and expatriates. While the ride may be lengthy, the diverse landscapes and attractions along the way make it a fascinating trip for anyone exploring the UAE.

Conclusion

Whether you’re heading to work, exploring new places, or visiting friends, this bus route ensures you reach your destination comfortably and efficiently. And knowing the 113 bus timings and route will also help you to arrange your schedule.
entry.summary: Let’s chat about the 113 bus the MVP of Dubai-Sharjah routes. This bad boy is always packed, and for good reason. It’s the lifeline connecting Al Rolla Terminal in Sharjah to Rashidiya Metro Station in Dubai, hitting all the key spots along the way.

entry.title: 55 RTA Bus Timings - Al Satwa Bus Station to International City

link.title: 55 RTA Bus Timings - Al Satwa Bus Station to International City

entry.content:
This bus route ensures smooth connectivity through key commercial and residential areas, making it a preferred choice for many travelers looking to navigate the city’s urban landscape.

Operational Details

The Bus 55 operates throughout the day, starting early in the morning at 6:00 AM from Al Satwa Bus Station and running late into the night to accommodate various travel needs.

From Al Satwa Bus Station From International City
06:00 05:40
06:45 05:59
07:05 06:20
07:25 06:40
07:50 07:00
08:15 07:20
08:40 07:35
08:59 08:00
09:25 08:25
09:50 08:50
10:15 09:15
10:40 09:46
11:05 10:20
11:40 10:45
12:05 11:10
12:30 11:35
13:00 12:05
13:30 12:35
14:00 13:05
14:30 13:35
15:05 14:05
15:35 14:30
16:00 15:00
16:20 15:25
16:40 16:00
17:00 16:20
17:20 16:40
17:40 17:00
18:05 17:20
18:28 17:40
18:50 18:05
19:15 18:30
19:39 18:55
19:59 19:20
20:20 19:45
20:40 20:10
21:00 20:30
21:30 20:50
22:25 21:10
21:35  
22:00  

Bus 55 Timetable

For the latest schedule, travelers are advised to check the official RTA website or refer to the 55 RTA Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payments for Bus 55 are made through the Nol card system, Dubai’s cashless payment solution. For travel within one zone, a Silver or Personal card costs AED 3. Travelers can easily top up their Nol cards at various locations throughout the city for a hassle-free experience.

Route Overview

Bus 55 departs from Al Satwa Bus Station and makes several important stops before reaching its final destination at International City, Persia District. Key stops include:

  1. Satwa Bus Station – The main starting point, providing connections to other buses and Dubai’s metro system.

  2. Satwa, Masjid – A community-focused stop, conveniently located near local shops and services.

  3. Satwa, Post Office – A practical stop for residents needing postal services.

  4. Satwa, Roundabout – A key junction that facilitates easy access to surrounding areas.

  5. World Trade Centre Hotel – Connecting travelers to one of Dubai’s major business hubs.

  6. 2nd Zaabel Road – An important thoroughfare linking various neighborhoods.

  7. Aden Street – A vital stop for residents and visitors in the vicinity.

  8. Ras Al Khor, 1 – A key stop in the industrial area, serving workers and businesses.

  9. Ras Al Khor, 2 – Another essential stop in this bustling industrial zone.

  10. Ras Al Khor, 3 – Catering to those traveling within the industrial region.

  11. Ras Al Khor, 4 – Serving as a convenient access point for workers.

  12. Ras Al Khor, Customs – A stop relevant for those involved in import/export activities.

  13. Ras Al Khor, 5 – Further facilitating travel within the industrial area.

  14. Ras Al Khor, 6 – Another crucial stop for commuters in this sector.

  15. Ras Al Khor, 7 – Helping connect more areas within the industrial zone.

  16. Tawoon Transportation – A hub for various transportation options.

  17. Mega Star Trading – A popular stop for shoppers and traders.

  18. Used Car Exhibition, 2 – A well-known stop for car buyers and sellers.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Ducamz, 1 – A key location for used car sales and purchases.

  2. Ducamz, 2 – Another significant stop within the used car market.

  3. Vegetable Market Union Coop. Society – Serving the local community with fresh produce.

  4. Vegetable Market – A hub for grocery shoppers.

  5. Post Office – Convenient for residents needing postal services.

  6. Rivera Dreams Apartments – Close to residential living, providing easy access for residents.

  7. CBD Buildings – A stop located in Dubai’s central business district.

  8. International City, Persia O02 – The final stop, situated in one of Dubai’s most affordable residential areas, offering convenient access to shopping and services.

  9. International City, Persia M03 – Located in the vibrant International City, providing access to various amenities.

Accessibility Features

RTA Bus 55 is equipped with several features to enhance the travel experience for all passengers. Designated seating areas, along with audio and visual aids, ensure that the bus is accessible and user-friendly for everyone, regardless of their mobility needs.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

At Al Satwa Bus Station, passengers can easily transfer to other RTA buses and Dubai Metro services, making it a key transport hub in the city. Similarly, in International City, travelers can access various local services and taxis for onward journeys.

For those looking to explore more of Dubai, Bus 55 also connects conveniently to shopping districts, residential areas, and industrial zones. This makes it a versatile transport option whether you are commuting for work or visiting the city for leisure.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Throughout the journey, passengers can access several major attractions and landmarks:

  1. World Trade Centre – A hub for exhibitions, conferences, and corporate events.

  2. Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary – Located near the industrial area, it’s one of Dubai’s most unique natural reserves, home to flamingos and other bird species.

Journey Experience

A ride on Bus 55 offers a unique glimpse of Dubai’s diverse urban landscape. As the bus departs from Al Satwa, passengers can observe the vibrant energy of one of Dubai’s busiest districts.

As you approach International City, the scenery becomes more residential, with rows of buildings designed with an international architectural theme. The affordable housing and shopping options here make it a popular choice for both expats and locals.

Tips and Travel Advice

To ensure a smooth journey on Bus 55, here are a few helpful tips:

  • Check the schedule: Use the RTA app to check real-time bus timings and avoid long waits, especially during peak hours.

  • Top up your Nol card: Ensure your Nol card has sufficient balance before boarding as cash payments are not accepted.
  • Travel during non-peak hours: If possible, try to avoid peak travel times (early morning and evening) to enjoy a more comfortable journey.

Bus 55, an Urban Bus of RTA Dubai, is a reliable and convenient option for traveling between Al Satwa and International City. It offers regular services, comfortable amenities, and seamless connectivity to various parts of Dubai. Whether you’re commuting for work, visiting attractions, or exploring the city, this route provides an affordable and efficient way to travel. For real-time updates and more information, passengers can use the RTA App or visit the official RTA website. Check out the full RTA Dubai bus route for more options!
entry.summary: This bus route ensures smooth connectivity through key commercial and residential areas, making it a preferred choice for many travelers looking to navigate the city’s urban landscape.

entry.title: F62 Bus Schedule Nadd Al Hamar to Umm Ramool and Return

link.title: F62 Bus Schedule Nadd Al Hamar to Umm Ramool and Return

entry.content:
Bus F62 provides a vital transportation link between Nadd Al Hamar and Umm Ramool, offering a reliable and affordable travel option for residents and visitors. Running in a loop from Nadd Al Hamar Terminus through several key stops and back, this route ensures convenient access to educational institutions, shopping centers, and commercial areas. Whether commuting to work, attending school, or running errands, Bus F62 is a flexible option for those traveling within Dubai.

Operational Details

With early morning to late-night service, it accommodates different schedules, ensuring that passengers have access to transportation whenever needed. Here are the key timings for the service:

From Nadd Al Hamar Terminus From Umm Ramool, Street 25
05:00 06:04
05:08 07:04
06:00 07:34
06:08 08:09
06:30 08:39
06:38 09:09
06:54 09:39
07:02 09:59
07:05 10:24
07:13 10:49
07:35 11:14
07:43 11:44
07:54 12:09
08:02 12:34
08:05 12:59
08:13 13:24
08:24 13:54
08:32 14:19
08:35 14:44
08:43 15:14
08:55 15:39
08:59 16:04
09:03 16:29
09:07 16:54
09:20 17:24
09:28 17:49
09:29 18:14
09:37 18:39
09:45 19:09
09:53 19:39
09:59 20:04
10:07 20:34
10:10 20:59
10:18 21:29
10:29 21:54
10:37 22:24
10:40 22:49
10:48 23:14
10:49 23:44
10:57 00:09
11:05 00:39
11:13 01:14
11:14  
11:22  
11:30  
11:38  
11:39  
11:47  
11:55  
12:03  
12:04  
12:12  
12:20  
12:28  
12:34  
12:42  
12:50  
12:58  
12:59  
13:07  
13:15  
13:23  
13:24  
13:32  
13:40  
13:48  
13:49  
13:57  
14:10  
14:14  
14:18  
14:22  
14:35  
14:43  
14:44  
14:52  
15:00  
15:08  
15:09  
15:17  
15:25  
15:33  
15:34  
15:42  
15:50  
15:58  
16:04  
16:12  
16:20  
16:28  
16:29  
16:37  
16:45  
16:53  
16:54  
17:02  
17:10  
17:18  
17:19  
17:27  
17:35  
17:43  
17:44  
17:52  
18:05  
18:13  
18:14  
18:22  
18:35  
18:39  
18:43  
18:47  
19:00  
19:04  
19:08  
19:12  
19:29  
19:30  
19:37  
19:38  
19:55  
19:59  
20:03  
20:07  
20:25  
20:29  
20:33  
20:37  
20:50  
20:54  
20:58  
21:02  
21:20  
21:24  
21:28  
21:32  
21:45  
21:49  
21:53  
21:57  
22:10  
22:18  
22:19  
22:27  
22:40  
22:44  
22:48  
22:52  
23:05  
23:13  
23:14  
23:22  
23:35  
23:39  
23:43  
23:47  
00:04  
00:10  
00:12  
00:18  
00:34  
00:42  
00:59  
01:07  
01:29  
01:37  
02:04  
02:12  

Bus F62 Timetable

For full details on the F62 bus schedule, visit the official RTA website or click here for F62 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing

Bus F62 offers an affordable fare of AED 5 for travel between Nadd Al Hamar and Umm Ramool, making it an economical option for both daily commuters and occasional travelers. The fare structure for Dubai’s public transport system is based on the number of zones traveled, and since the F62 route typically covers one zone, the fare remains consistent at AED 5.

Route Overview

Bus F62 starts its journey at the Nadd Al Hamar Terminus and takes passengers through several key locations before reaching Umm Ramool, Street 25, and looping back to Nadd Al Hamar. The route offers stops at malls, schools, business centers, and residential areas, providing a balanced service that caters to both commuters and casual travelers. Key stops along the route include:

  1. Nadd Al Hamar Terminus The starting and ending point of the journey, connecting passengers to various local and regional transport options.

  2. Al Telal 17 A residential stop catering to the local community.

  3. Al Awal Building A convenient stop for residents and visitors in the area.

  4. Al Zarooni Building Providing easy access to residential and commercial locations.

  5. Al Zarooni Masjid A community stop offering access to a local mosque for worshippers.

  6. The City School International A key stop for students and staff at the school.

  7. Avenues A shopping and entertainment destination along the route.

  8. One Square Mall A popular stop for shoppers in the area.

  9. Aswaq Mall A convenient retail hub for nearby residents.

  10. Health Center Providing easy access to healthcare services.

  11. Nadd Al Hamar Park A recreational stop for families and visitors.

  12. Al Badia Entrance Gateway to the Al Badia residential community.

  13. Deira International School A key stop for students, parents, and school staff.

  14. Al Badia Residences Serving residents of this popular residential area.

  15. Hillside Village A A community-focused stop for residents in this neighborhood.

  16. Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre A major shopping and entertainment destination along the route.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Dubai Festival City, Marks & Spencer A well-known landmark for shopping enthusiasts.

  2. Sheikh Zayed Housing Program A stop providing access to residential and community services.

  3. Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School A key stop for the school community.

  4. American College of Dubai A stop serving students and staff at the college.

  5. Grammar School Another important stop for the educational community.

  6. Roads & Transport Authority HQ A central hub for Dubai’s transport operations.

  7. Mawakeb School A stop for students and staff at this educational institution.

  8. Al Futtaim Auto Center A key stop for those accessing automotive services.

  9. Dubai Commer City A business hub with several stops for ease of access.

  10. Emirates Metro Providing seamless connectivity to the Dubai Metro system.

  11. Umm Ramool, Street 25 The midpoint of the journey and a significant hub in the Umm Ramool area.

  12. Street 25, Khansaheb Serving nearby industrial and residential areas.

  13. Nadd Al Hamar Road, Service Road A key stop for commuters in this busy area.

  14. Areen East West A stop providing access to residential and commercial facilities.

  15. Holiday Inn A stop for hotel guests and travelers.

Nearby Attractions

Bus F62 provides convenient access to several key landmarks and attractions, making it a great choice for both commuters and visitors. Key attractions along the route include:

  • Dubai Festival City

  • Deira International School
  • Al Badia Park

Journey Experience

Bus F62 offers a comfortable and efficient journey from Nadd Al Hamar to Umm Ramool and back, passing through key areas like One Square Mall and Dubai Festival City. With air-conditioned seating and accessible features for people of determination (PoD), the bus ensures a smooth ride for all passengers.

Whether you’re heading to work or exploring the city, Bus F62 provides a reliable, hassle-free travel experience.

Bus F62 serves as a convenient and efficient transport option for those traveling between Nadd Al Hamar and Umm Ramool. With well-placed stops, frequent service, and a direct route, it caters to both daily commuters and occasional travelers. Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or exploring the city, Bus F62 offers an affordable and reliable way to navigate Dubai. For more detailed schedule and route information, be sure to consult the official RTA resources.
entry.summary: Bus F62 provides a vital transportation link between Nadd Al Hamar and Umm Ramool, offering a reliable and affordable travel option for residents and visitors. Running in a loop from Nadd Al Hamar Terminus through several key stops and back, this route ensures convenient access to educational institutions, shopping centers, and commercial areas. Whether commuting to work, attending school, or running errands, Bus F62 is a flexible option for those traveling within Dubai.

entry.title: Discover the F41 Bus Timetable From Business Bay Metro Landside to RBC Tower and Return

link.title: Discover the F41 Bus Timetable From Business Bay Metro Landside to RBC Tower and Return

entry.content:
Dubai Bus F41 provides a crucial transport link connecting Business Bay Metro Landside to various key destinations in the Business Bay area.

Bus Timings

At the Business Bay Metro Landside · 1 departure point, the F41 bus operates throughout the day at frequent intervals. Services start from early morning and continue until late at night, ensuring commuters have convenient travel options during both peak and off-peak hours. The consistent schedule accommodates the varied needs of passengers throughout the day.

From Business Bay Metro Landside From RBC Tower
06:10 06:34
06:30 06:54
06:40 07:04
06:50 07:14
07:00 07:24
07:08 07:32
07:17 07:41
07:27 07:51
07:37 08:01
07:47 08:11
07:57 08:21
08:07 08:31
08:17 08:41
08:27 08:51
08:37 09:01
08:48 09:12
08:59 09:23
09:10 09:34
09:21 09:45
09:32 09:56
09:43 10:07
09:53 10:17
10:03 10:27
10:13 10:37
10:23 10:47
10:34 10:58
10:45 11:09
10:56 11:20
11:08 11:32
11:19 11:43
11:31 11:55
11:44 12:08
11:58 12:22

23:14 23:38
23:44 00:08

Download PDF Bus F41

Bus F41 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F41 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The F41 route includes stops at the following locations:

  • Business Bay Metro Landside · 1

  • The Binary Tower
  • Collapse
  • Clover Bay Tower
  • Lake Central Tower
  • South Ridge Tower
  • Burj View Central Tower
  • Bay Square
  • Canal View Hotel Apartments
  • Coral Tower
  • Empire Heights Towers
  • RBC Tower
  • Al Madar Scala Tower
  • Clayton Residency
  • Fairview Residency
  • Mayfair Residency
  • Volante Dubai Tower
  • U BORA Tower
  • XL Tower
  • Lillian Tower
  • Business Bay Metro Landside · 1

Also See: Detailed Information on Dubai Bus F16: Route and Stops

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Bus Ticket Price

Expect to pay around AED 3 for an F41 bus ticket in Dubai. This is the minimum fare applicable for travel within a single zone on the city’s zone-based fare system.

Bus Booking

While online booking specifics were not provided, passengers can directly access the bus at designated stops or refer to official Dubai transport resources for more information on routes, schedules, and ticketing details.

Journey Experience

The F41 bus route from Business Bay Metro Landside to RBC Tower and back offers a long but engaging journey through Dubai’s vibrant cityscape.

As the bus continues, it navigates through busy business districts and urban neighborhoods, providing a look at the city’s ever-growing skyline. The journey concludes at RBC Tower, a key business hub, making it convenient for professionals. Though lengthy, the route offers a compelling glimpse into Dubai’s mix of modern architecture, cultural sites, and urban energy, making it a fascinating ride for those exploring the city.

Read More: Comprehensive Guide to Dubai Bus 27: Route and Stops

Traveling with Careem

The approximate fare for this journey ranges between AED 29 to 34, providing a cost-effective transportation option amidst Dubai’s vibrant business district.
entry.summary: Dubai Bus F41 provides a crucial transport link connecting Business Bay Metro Landside to various key destinations in the Business Bay area.

entry.title: Abu Dhabi Bus 110 Schedule Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to National Petroleum Corporation

link.title: Abu Dhabi Bus 110 Schedule Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to National Petroleum Corporation

entry.content:
Reg Bus 110 is a key player in Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network, connecting the busy Al Danah district with the industrial zone of Mussafah. Serving both residents and visitors, this route offers a reliable and affordable travel option, running from Sultan Bin Zayed Street/Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to Street 16/National Petroleum Corporation.

As Abu Dhabi continues to grow, Reg Bus 110 remains essential, linking commercial, residential, and industrial areas, providing easy access to workplaces, shopping centers, and other important destinations.

Operational Details

Reg Bus 110 operates with consistent frequency throughout the day:

From Khalifa Bin Zayed Street From National Petroleum Corporation
05:47 07:03
06:02 07:18
06:17 07:33
06:32 07:48
06:47 08:03
07:02 08:18
07:17 08:33
07:32 08:48
07:47 09:03
08:02 09:18
08:17 09:33
08:32 09:48
08:47 10:03
09:02 10:18
09:17 10:33
09:32 10:48
09:47 11:03
10:02 11:18
10:17 11:33
10:32 11:48
10:47 12:03
11:02 12:18
11:17 12:33
11:32 12:48
11:47 13:03
12:02 13:18
12:17 13:33
12:32 13:48
12:47 14:03
13:02 14:18
13:17 14:33
13:32 14:48
13:47 15:03
14:02 15:18
14:17 15:33
14:32 15:48
14:47 16:03
15:02 16:18
15:17 16:33
15:32 16:48
15:47 17:03
16:02 17:18
16:17 17:33
16:32 17:48
16:47 18:03
17:02 18:18
17:17 18:33
17:32 18:48
17:47 19:03
18:02 19:18
18:17 19:33
18:32 19:48
18:47 20:03
19:02 20:18
19:17 20:33
19:32 20:48
19:47 21:03
20:02 21:18
20:17 21:33
20:32 21:48
20:47 22:03
21:02 22:18
21:17 22:33
21:32 22:48
21:47 23:03
22:02 23:18
22:17 23:33
22:32 23:48
22:47 00:03

Download PDF Bus 110

Bus 110 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link to view the 110 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing:

  • Cash Ticket: AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer.

  • Payment Methods: Tickets can be purchased or topped up using the Hafilat Smart Card, available at multiple locations. For detailed fare information, visit the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport’s website.

Route Overview

Reg Bus 110 starts its journey at Al Danah, Sultan Bin Zayed Street/Khalifa Bin Zayed Street, and ends at Mussafah, Street 16/National Petroleum Corporation.

  1. Capital Park A popular spot for relaxation and outdoor activities.

  2. Gold Center A renowned commercial hub for jewelry and retail shopping.

  3. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A peaceful mosque situated along the route.

  4. Abu Dhabi Bus Station A major hub connecting passengers to various bus routes.

  5. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A central road in Abu Dhabi.

  6. Al Jazeera Sports Club A venue for sports and recreational activities.

  7. Al Maqta Bus Interchange A key transfer point for connecting bus routes.

  8. Street 15 A mixed-use area with both commercial and residential buildings.

  9. Civil Defence Near Abu Dhabi’s emergency services.

  10. Street 11 A notable residential area.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. ADNOC The headquarters of the UAE’s leading energy company.

  2. ICAD Residential City Main Gate The gateway to the industrial city.

  3. ICAD Residential City Gate 2 An additional entry to the industrial zone.

  4. Medical Industries Home to medical-related businesses and industries.

  5. Friday Market A vibrant local market offering a variety of goods.

  6. Gulf Steel Industries Located in the heart of the steel production zone.

  7. National Petroleum Corporation The final stop on the route, serving the petroleum industry.

The complete journey takes approximately 64 minutes, providing a convenient option for commuters and travelers.

Accessibility Features

Reg Bus 110 is designed with accessibility in mind, featuring ramps, designated seating for differently-abled passengers, and audio-visual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments. This ensures a comfortable and inclusive experience for all passengers, allowing everyone to travel with ease and dignity across the city.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

Reg Bus 110 integrates seamlessly with other bus routes, particularly at Al Maqta Bus Interchange and Abu Dhabi Bus Station, making transfers easy and helping travelers reach destinations across Abu Dhabi and beyond. This network will also integrate with future metro services, further enhancing connectivity.

Nearby Attractions

  • Capital Park

  • Gold Center
  • Mariam Bint Said Mosque
  • Abu Dhabi Bus Station

Journey Experience

This route provides a comprehensive view of Abu Dhabi’s blend of business, culture, and industry.

Travel Tips

To make your trip more enjoyable, consider traveling during off-peak hours to avoid crowds. Stay updated on real-time bus schedules and route changes by downloading the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app. It’s also useful to carry a portable phone charger to keep your devices powered for on-the-go updates.

Its extensive list of stops ensures convenient access to key locations across the city.

Whether you’re commuting to work, running errands, or exploring Abu Dhabi, Reg Bus 110 provides a cost-effective, eco-friendly, and efficient solution for urban mobility. Hop on this route and experience Abu Dhabi’s public transport at its best! To explore more routes and plan your journey efficiently, take a look at the Full Abu Dhabi Bus Routes for a comprehensive guide to all available services.
entry.summary: Reg Bus 110 is a key player in Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network, connecting the busy Al Danah district with the industrial zone of Mussafah. Serving both residents and visitors, this route offers a reliable and affordable travel option, running from Sultan Bin Zayed Street/Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to Street 16/National Petroleum Corporation.

entry.title: Abu Dhabi Bus X4 Timings - Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) to Corniche Hospital 2

link.title: Abu Dhabi Bus X4 Timings - Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) to Corniche Hospital 2

entry.content:
Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system is designed to provide affordable and reliable travel options across the city and its surrounding areas. One of its essential routes, Bus X4, connects Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) to Corniche Hospital 2, serving both commuters and visitors to vital local services.

Whether you’re heading to work, visiting the hospital, or exploring the city, Bus X4 offers a convenient option for navigating Abu Dhabi.

Operational Details

Bus X4 operates throughout the day, providing consistent and reliable service for passengers. Here are the key timings for Bus X4 departing from both Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) and Corniche Hospital 2:

From Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) From Corniche Hospital 2
05:35 05:28
06:06 05:58
06:36 06:26
07:05 06:56
07:35 07:23
08:05 07:53
08:35 08:26
09:05 08:56
09:35 09:25
10:05 09:55
10:35 10:24
11:05 10:54
11:35 11:23
12:05 11:53
12:35 12:25
13:05 12:55
13:35 13:23
14:05 13:53
14:35 14:22
15:05 14:52
15:35 15:24
16:05 15:54
16:35 16:23
17:05 16:53
17:35 17:19
18:05 17:49
18:35 18:20
19:05 18:50
19:35 19:21
20:05 19:51
20:35 20:24
21:05 20:54
21:35 21:26
22:06 21:56
22:36 22:28
23:06 22:58

Bus X4 Timetable

For a complete schedule, passengers can visit the official AD Mobility website for real-time updates and further details.

Ticket Pricing: To travel on Bus X4, passengers utilize the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare for travel within one zone is AED 2, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Topping up the Hafilat card is easy, as it can be done online or at various kiosks across the city, ensuring a smooth cash-free experience for all travelers.

Route Overview

Bus X4 runs from Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) to Corniche Hospital 2, making stops at numerous key locations. Here’s a full list of stops along this route:

  1. Khaleej Al Arabi St / Bus Interchange The main starting point for commuters.

  2. Saif Ghobash St / Mediclinic Hospital Provides access to essential healthcare services.

  3. Saif Ghobash St / Al Qiyadah St A crucial junction for local access.

  4. Shk. Rashid Bin Saeed St / Rabdan St Connects residential areas to local amenities.

  5. Shk. Rashid Bin Saeed St / Mushrif Mall A popular shopping destination for daily needs.

  6. Shk. Rashid Bin Saeed St / Immigration Department Important for residents needing immigration services.

  7. Shk. Rashid Bin Saeed St / Mohammed Bin Khalifa St A busy intersection for traffic flow.

  8. Shk. Rashid Bin Saeed St / Hazza’ Bin Zayed St Local access point for residents.

  9. Shk. Rashid Bin Saeed St / Al Falah St A residential stop for easy commuting.

  10. Shk. Rashid Bin Saeed St / Etisalat Key service provider stop.

  11. Zayed The First St / Al Saj’ah St A strategic stop for local businesses.

  12. Zayed The First St / Al Thughour St Connects to various residential neighborhoods.

  13. Zayed The First St / Al Silaymi St Offers access to surrounding areas.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Zayed The First St / Electra Park A local recreational area.

  2. Al Maiyani St A residential stop in the vicinity.

  3. Al Maiyani St / Al Mirji St Local access point for daily commuters.

  4. Al Meena St / Corniche Hospital 2 The final destination providing vital healthcare services.

Accessibility and Services

Bus X4 is designed to accommodate passengers with special needs, ensuring comfort and accessibility for everyone. The buses are equipped with:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for passengers with mobility issues.
  • Audio-visual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments.

This inclusive design makes Bus X4 a suitable choice for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Throughout the journey, passengers can access several significant attractions and landmarks, enhancing their travel experience. Some notable sites include: 1.

  1. Heritage Village A cultural attraction showcasing traditional Emirati life, arts, and crafts.

3.

Journey Experience

Approaching Corniche Hospital 2, the atmosphere shifted to tranquility, with the picturesque Corniche waterfront promenade revealing a green haven adorned with palm trees and stunning sea views.

Throughout the journey, the bus provided a clean and comfortable environment, allowing the traveler to observe the daily lives of Abu Dhabi residents, making the trip not merely a means of transport but an enriching exploration of the city’s culture and attractions.

Travel Tips for Bus X4

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings to avoid unnecessary waiting, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for quick, cashless payment on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules to optimize your journey.
  • Avoid Peak Times: If you prefer a quieter ride, consider traveling outside of rush hours in the morning and afternoon.

In conclusion, Bus X4 provides a dependable and accessible option for traveling between Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) and Corniche Hospital 2.

Whether you’re commuting for work, visiting the hospital, or exploring the city, Bus X4 guarantees a smooth and budget-friendly journey. For a complete overview of all available routes, don’t forget to check out the full Abu Dhabi bus list.
entry.summary: Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system is designed to provide affordable and reliable travel options across the city and its surrounding areas. One of its essential routes, Bus X4, connects Khaleej Al Arabi St (Bus Interchange) to Corniche Hospital 2, serving both commuters and visitors to vital local services.

entry.title: Hatta to Sabkha E16 Bus Timings Guide

link.title: Hatta to Sabkha E16 Bus Timings Guide

entry.content:
Planning a trip from Hatta to Al Sabkha? Whether you’re a regular commuter or exploring Dubai for the first time, Bus E16 is your most efficient and affordable option. This guide provides all the details on bus timings, fares, and the stops along the way to ensure a smooth journey. By the end, you’ll know exactly how to get from Hatta to Sabkha hassle-free.

Bus Route E16 (Best Option)

Bus E16 is your go-to for traveling from Hatta to Al Sabkha. It offers a direct, cost-effective route with multiple stops along the way.

  • Estimated Travel Time: 2 hours and 54 minutes

  • Cost: AED 15-25
  • Bus Frequency: Every 3 hours

Journey Overview

Step 1: Start by taking a taxi from Hatta to Emirates NBD 2 (17 minutes, 7.1 km, AED 25-30).

Step 2: From Emirates NBD 2, board Bus E16. The bus journey to Al Sabkha takes approximately 2 hours and 37 minutes.

Key Stops on Bus E16:

  1. Hatta, Hatta Fort Hotel 2

  2. Hatta Souq 2

  3. Maleha Municipality 2

  4. Al Madam, Health Care Center 2

  5. Al Madam, Roundabout 2

  6. Hatta Road Al Rifadah 2

  7. Ramool Adventure Park 2

  8. Nazwa, Al Wista Supermarket 2

  9. Nazwa, Al Jabal Emirates Petrol Station 2

  10. Habab, Reem Emarat Petrol Station 2

  11. Habab, Roundabout 2

  12. Awir, New Shabia 2

  13. Awir, Terminus 2

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Awir, Wadi Al Shabak Camp 2

  2. Al Warsan 1, Eppco

  3. Ras Al Khor, Comm. Complex 1

  4. Wasl, Wasl Club 2

  5. Latifa Hospital

  6. Oud Metha Road 2-2

  7. Oud Metha Road 1-2

  8. Oud Metha Metro Bus Stop 2

  9. British Council 1

  10. Rashid Hospital

  11. Dubai Courts 1

  12. Maktoum Road 2

  13. Etisalat Head Office 2

  14. Union Metro Bus Stop 3-1

  15. Deira, Beniyas Road 1

Travel Tips

  • Best Time to Travel: Plan your trip during off-peak hours to avoid delays, as traffic can affect travel times, particularly when passing through busier parts of Dubai.

  • Nol Card: Make sure your Nol card is topped up before boarding. Nol cards can be purchased and refilled at any metro station, convenience store, or online.
  • Checking the Bus Timings: It’s recommended to check the Dubai RTA app for real-time bus updates, or you can check the Bus E16 Timings here.
  • Comfort: Dubai RTA buses are air-conditioned and equipped with comfortable seating, making the longer journey more pleasant, especially during the hotter months.

The E16 bus is a reliable and cost-effective way to travel from Hatta to Al Sabkha. With scenic views along the route and key stops connecting you to various parts of Dubai, it’s a great option for budget travelers. Make sure to check the bus schedule in advance and have your Nol card ready for a seamless trip. Whether you’re heading into the city for shopping, business, or leisure, Bus E16 has you covered.
entry.summary: Planning a trip from Hatta to Al Sabkha? Whether you’re a regular commuter or exploring Dubai for the first time, Bus E16 is your most efficient and affordable option. This guide provides all the details on bus timings, fares, and the stops along the way to ensure a smooth journey. By the end, you’ll know exactly how to get from Hatta to Sabkha hassle-free.

entry.title: Dubai Bus 25: Full Route and Stops Guide

link.title: Dubai Bus 25: Full Route and Stops Guide

entry.content:
Bus 25 in Dubai provides a vital link between Gold Souq Bus Station and Rashidiya Bus Station Parking, offering a comprehensive route through key areas of the city.

The bus operates with frequent services throughout the day, ensuring convenience and accessibility for passengers. Its well-planned route and reliable service make it an essential component of Dubai’s public transport network.

Route Name 25
Route Description Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 - Rashidiya Bus Station Parking
Total Distance Approximately 15 to 22.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 45 minutes
Operational Hours 04:00 to 23:30 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 25

Bus Timings

Bus 25 operates with frequent service throughout the day. Here are the timings for each direction:

  • From Rashidiya Bus Station Parking: 05:00, 06:00, 06:30, 07:00, 07:20, 07:40, 08:00, 08:25, 08:50, 09:15, 09:40, 10:05, 10:30, 11:05, 11:40, 12:10, 12:40, 13:15, 13:45, 14:15, 14:45, 15:10, 15:35, 16:00, 16:20, 16:40, 17:00, 17:20, 17:42, 18:04, 18:24, 18:44, 19:06, 19:28, 19:48, 20:12, 20:35, 21:00, 21:30, 22:05, 22:35, 23:00, 23:30

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 25 is AED 5. This price provides a cost-effective option for traveling across the entire route. Whether you are a daily commuter or an occasional traveler, the fare is designed to be affordable while ensuring quality service and convenience. Additionally, the value of the fare is enhanced by the bus’s comprehensive route and frequent service, making it a practical choice for navigating Dubai.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 25 does not offer online booking options. The app also allows users to check bus schedules, plan their journeys, and view live bus locations.

Bus Route

Bus 25 traverses a diverse route across Dubai, connecting notable locations and providing access to various points of interest. The route starts at Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 and includes the following stops:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 24

  2. Naif, Intersection

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  4. Nakhal

  5. Union Metro · 1

  6. Etisalat Head Office

  7. Maktoum Road

  8. Clock Tower Roundabout

  9. DNATA

  10. Flame Intersection

  11. Garhoud, Intersection

  12. Airport Terminal 1, External Parking

  13. Emirates Airlines Headquarters

  14. Gulf & Safa Diaries

15.

  1. Veterinary Clinic

  2. Police Station

  3. Al Jahiz Boys School

  4. Rashidiya, Street 38

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Rashidiya Bus Station, Arrival

  2. Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

The return route from Rashidiya Bus Station Parking to Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 follows the same stops in reverse order.

Bus 25 Station Overview

Gold Souq Bus Station · 24

Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 is a key transit point situated near the bustling Gold Souq area, a popular destination for shopping and exploring traditional markets in Dubai. The station is well-equipped with essential amenities, including sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Its central location makes it a convenient stop for shoppers and tourists visiting the Gold Souq, providing easy access to the vibrant marketplace and surrounding attractions. The station’s facilities and strategic placement enhance the overall travel experience for passengers heading to and from this lively commercial area.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient and efficient travel experience for commuters using these intersecting bus services.

Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

Rashidiya Bus Station Parking serves as an important transportation hub in the Rashidiya area, offering a dedicated parking area for buses and convenient access for commuters. The station provides essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and up-to-date bus schedule information.

Its location supports efficient transit operations and facilitates smooth travel for passengers in the Rashidiya region. The parking facility ensures that buses can efficiently manage passenger flow while offering a reliable transit option for local residents and visitors using the Rashidiya Bus Station.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several notable tourist attractions and destinations along the Bus 25 route:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 24: Located near the famous Gold Souq in Dubai, a bustling market known for its extensive range of gold and jewelry shops.

  2. Naif, Intersection: Close to the vibrant Naif Souq, a traditional market offering textiles, electronics, and various goods.

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection: Near the Burj Nahar, a historical watchtower that provides a glimpse into Dubai’s past.

  4. Union Metro · 1: A key transportation hub in Dubai, offering access to the Union Metro Station, which connects to multiple lines.

  5. Etisalat Head Office: While primarily a corporate building, it’s situated in an area with various commercial and dining options.

  6. Clock Tower Roundabout: A prominent landmark and historical monument, one of Dubai’s most recognizable symbols.

7.

  1. Flame Intersection: Located near the Garhoud area, known for its vibrant community and dining options.

  2. Airport Terminal 1, External Parking: Provides access to Dubai International Airport, a major travel hub with various amenities and shopping options.

  3. Emirates Airlines Headquarters: The headquarters of one of the world’s leading airlines, located in the vicinity of several modern developments.

11.

12.

  1. Veterinary Clinic: While not a tourist spot, it serves the community with pet care services.

  2. Police Station: Provides essential services and safety to the area.

  3. Al Jahiz Boys School: A local educational institution contributing to the community’s development.

  4. Rashidiya Bus Station, Arrival: A major bus terminal that connects various parts of Dubai, facilitating further exploration of the city.

These locations provide a mix of cultural, historical, and modern experiences for visitors traveling on Bus 25.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Rashidiya Bus Station Parking, the furthest point on the Bus 25 route, starting from Gold Souq Bus Station · 24. The fare for this journey ranges between AED 56 and AED 67, making it a cost-effective option for reaching your destination comfortably and efficiently.

Dubai Bus 25 is a well-integrated part of the city’s public transport system, offering extensive coverage and reliable service. Its route connects major commercial and residential areas, providing essential access across Dubai. With frequent service and an affordable fare, it caters effectively to the needs of both regular commuters and visitors exploring the city. For real-time updates and journey planning, the RTA app remains a valuable resource for passengers.
entry.summary: Bus 25 in Dubai provides a vital link between Gold Souq Bus Station and Rashidiya Bus Station Parking, offering a comprehensive route through key areas of the city.
